emails.subject: pricing - Aug 13
emails.body: pricing Aug 13 Jon, I need some pricing out of November 1 one two three year for these accounts (3) Calgary Area Managers is on the Buy sheet of the file. Thanks Big Stud! Man it's going to suck when your gone. Greg If you need some paraphernalia before you go let me know. Gregory Frers Enron Direct Sales Manager Suite 950, Encor Place 645 7th. Avenue SW Calgary, Alberta T2P 4G8 Ph. 403-663-2805 Fax 403-663-2899 Greg.Frers@enron.com <mailto:Greg.Frers@enron.com>

emails.subject: RE: pricing - Aug 13
emails.body: RE: pricing Aug 13 Sierras West Hillsboro Enterprises Area Managers 1 year 4.43 4.42 4.44 2 year 4.605 4.59 4.63 3 year 4.685 4.67 4.72 Don't fumble these!!!!!!!!!!!!!! Regards, Jon To: Mckay, Jonathan

emails.subject: RE: pricing - Aug 13
emails.body: Jon can I get a four and five year for Sierras West as well ASAP Thanks should close this morning. Greg To: Frers, Greg
